## Checklist

### Pre-merge Requirements

- [ ] Bug is fixed and verified
- [ ] No regression introduced
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Branch is up to date with develop
- [ ] Code review approved

### Post-merge Actions

- [ ] Close related issue(s)
- [ ] Update issue status
- [ ] Notify stakeholders (if needed)
- [ ] Monitor for recurrence
